summary: Frontend testing completed for Social Media preview features and Pipeline horizontal scroll. All requested features are working correctly: Facebook/Instagram realistic previews with dropdown selector, Writing Assistant button removed, Desktop/Mobile toggle, real-time preview updates, and Pipeline horizontal scrollbar with indicator.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Social Media preview features and Pipeline horizontal scroll are working correctly.

social_media_create_post_modal.modal_opens: PASS - Modal opens when clicking 'Créer un post' button
social_media_create_post_modal.preview_dropdown_selector: PASS - 'Facebook Feed preview' and 'Instagram feed preview' options in dropdown
social_media_create_post_modal.writing_assistant_absent: PASS - Writing Assistant button is ABSENT from toolbar (only Emoji, Location, Hashtag buttons present)
social_media_create_post_modal.desktop_mobile_toggle: PASS - Monitor and Smartphone icons toggle preview size
social_media_create_post_modal.real_time_preview_update: PASS - Preview updates as user types content

facebook_preview.avatar: PASS - Blue circular avatar with 'A' initial
facebook_preview.name: PASS - 'Alpha Agency' displayed
facebook_preview.content_text: PASS - User-typed content displayed in preview
facebook_preview.reactions_bar: PASS - Shows '24' reactions with Like/Heart icons, '3 commentaires', '1 partage'
facebook_preview.action_buttons: PASS - J'aime, Commenter, Partager buttons with icons

instagram_preview.image_placeholder: PASS - Square aspect ratio image area
instagram_preview.action_icons: PASS - Heart, Comment, Share, Bookmark icons
instagram_preview.caption: PASS - Handle + content text displayed

pipeline_horizontal_scroll.custom_scrollbar: PASS - Red gradient scrollbar (#CE0202) visible at bottom
pipeline_horizontal_scroll.scroll_indicator_text: PASS - 'Faites défiler horizontalement pour voir toutes les colonnes' text visible
pipeline_horizontal_scroll.columns_visible: PASS - 7 pipeline columns (Nouveau, Négociation, Qualifié, Réunion programmée, Gagné, etc.)
pipeline_horizontal_scroll.css_scrollbar_styles: PASS - Custom webkit scrollbar styles applied (height: 10px, red gradient thumb)
